title: Data Compilation
instruction: The CFO asked you to compile Q1 numbers. Three department heads — Jordan Brooks, Theo Patel, and Sofia Garcia — each sent an email with their department's quarterly figures. Find all three emails (they may be in different inbox tabs or require scrolling). Extract the budget number from each and compose a new email to miles.wright@executive.test with a subject line 'Q1 Budget Summary'. List all three numbers in the body, labeled by department. CC all three department heads.
eval_check_descriptions: Dept A department name in body
Dept B department name in body
Dept C department name in body

emails.subject: Revised budget worksheet
emails.body:
Sending a quick status update from today's working session.

Nothing looks blocked right now, but we still need one decision on timing. No response needed unless you want anything reordered.

Thanks,
Maya

emails.subject: Reminder on document review timing
emails.body:
Sending a quick status update from today's working session.

Nothing looks blocked right now, but we still need one decision on timing. If you want, I can turn this into a cleaner summary before the meeting.

Thanks,
Maya

emails.subject: Follow-up on venue estimate
emails.body:
Sharing the latest notes before tomorrow's check-in.

Nothing looks blocked right now, but we still need one decision on timing. No response needed unless you want anything reordered.

Thanks,
Jordan

emails.subject: Q1 figures — Engineering
emails.body:
Here are the Q1 budget figures for Engineering.

Total Q1 spend: $142,500

Let me know if you need a breakdown by cost center.

Thanks,
Jordan

emails.subject: Follow-up on venue estimate
emails.body:
Passing along the current draft so you have it in one place.

Nothing looks blocked right now, but we still need one decision on timing. Happy to consolidate comments if more feedback comes in.

Thanks,
Priya

emails.subject: Revised budget worksheet
emails.body:
I pulled the loose ends into one note for easier review.

The open items are mostly ownership questions rather than scope changes. If you want, I can turn this into a cleaner summary before the meeting.

Thanks,
Avery

emails.subject: Q1 figures — Marketing
emails.body:
Attached are the Q1 budget numbers for Marketing.

Our total Q1 spend came in at $89,000.

Happy to walk through the details on our next call.

Thanks,
Theo
